Measurement framework only — studies stablecoin settlement windows, finality, and payment-infrastructure risk under stated assumptions. Does not prove causal effects without identification. Not financial advice, not investment recommendation, not a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold any stablecoin or crypto asset, and not operational guidance for live treasury or payment systems.

robustness.notes: Compare ledger vs economic finality rankings.
Compare stablecoin vs traditional VSI corridor rankings.
Exclude mock and manual source IDs.
Compliance drag index on non-mock subset.
Compare SWC core vs extended specifications.

vsi.title: RPW total cost and VSI
vsi.hypothesis: Corridors with higher RPW total cost are associated with lower Value Survival Index.
vsi.identification_limitation: Cross-sectional association; RPW total cost may bundle unobserved provider quality.
vsi.credibility_risk: RPW samples may not represent all payout rails or send amounts.

vsi.title: FX volatility and risk-adjusted VSI
vsi.hypothesis: Higher FX volatility is associated with lower risk-adjusted VSI under the timing/volatility specification.
vsi.identification_limitation: Volatility is endogenous to macro conditions; no exogenous shock without event study.
vsi.credibility_risk: Volatility penalty weight (0.10 baseline) is a modeling assumption, not observed loss.

vsi.title: Inflation and real value survival
vsi.hypothesis: Higher recipient-country inflation is associated with lower real value survival (inflation erosion channel).
vsi.identification_limitation: Inflation correlates with FX depreciation and policy credibility.
vsi.credibility_risk: Annual inflation applied to short transfer windows may overstate erosion for fast transfers.

vsi.title: Remittance dependence and aggregate welfare loss
vsi.hypothesis: Higher remittance dependence magnifies aggregate welfare loss from low VSI (scale effect, not causal welfare).
vsi.identification_limitation: Flow estimates are model-based; aggregate loss is arithmetic, not household welfare.
vsi.credibility_risk: KNOMAD flows are estimated, not transaction-level.

vsi.title: Currency trust and extended VSI
vsi.hypothesis: Lower currency trust scores are associated with higher extended value leakage (VSI_EXTENDED).
vsi.expected_sign: Positive on trust_discount_pct; negative on currency_trust_score
vsi.identification_limitation: Trust score is composite; trust discount is model-based, not market-observed.
vsi.credibility_risk: Extended specification — not in baseline VSI_CORE.

vsi.title: Dollar shocks and dollar-dependent currencies
vsi.hypothesis: Dollar-dependent currencies show greater VSI deterioration during dollar shock periods (event-study association).
vsi.identification_limitation: DXY shocks are global; confounding macro events common.
vsi.credibility_risk: Requires sufficient event dates and non-mock FX data.
